languages.text: Ксеносская ловушка была уничтожена взрывом реплики дворца Даргонуса, что позволило Лорд-капитану вырваться на свободу.

traits.locale_text: Ксеносская ловушка была уничтожена взрывом реплики дворца Даргонуса, что позволило Лорд-капитану вырваться на свободу.

languages.text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.
languages.original_text: Ксеносская ловушка была уничтожена взрывом реплики дворца Даргонуса, что позволило Лорд-капитану вырваться на свободу.

traits.locale_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.
The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.
The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

languages.text: 随着达戈努斯宫殿复制品的爆炸，异形的陷阱灰飞烟灭，舰长大人也得以脱身。
languages.original_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

traits.locale_text: 随着达戈努斯宫殿复制品的爆炸，异形的陷阱灰飞烟灭，舰长大人也得以脱身。

languages.text: La explosión de la réplica del palacio de Dargonus destruyó la trampa xenos, liberando con ello {mf|al|a la} Lord Capitán.
languages.original_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

traits.locale_text: La explosión de la réplica del palacio de Dargonus destruyó la trampa xenos, liberando con ello {mf|al|a la} Lord Capitán.

languages.text: Le piège xénos a été détruit par l'explosion de la réplique du palais de Dargonus, ce qui a permis {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} de se libérer.
languages.original_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

traits.locale_text: Le piège xénos a été détruit par l'explosion de la réplique du palais de Dargonus, ce qui a permis {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} de se libérer.

languages.text: Die Xenos-Falle wurde durch die Explosion der Replik des Palastes von Dargonus zerstört, wodurch sich der Lord Captain befreien konnte.
languages.original_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

traits.locale_text: Die Xenos-Falle wurde durch die Explosion der Replik des Palastes von Dargonus zerstört, wodurch sich der Lord Captain befreien konnte.

languages.text: Zeno tuzağı, Dargonus Sarayı'nın kopyasının patlamasıyla yok edildi. Bu da Lord Kaptan'ın kurtulmasını sağladı.
languages.original_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

traits.locale_text: Zeno tuzağı, Dargonus Sarayı'nın kopyasının patlamasıyla yok edildi. Bu da Lord Kaptan'ın kurtulmasını sağladı.

languages.text: ドガノスの宮殿のレプリカが爆発し、異星人の罠が破壊されたことで、ロード・キャプテンは解放された。
languages.original_text: The xenos trap was destroyed by the explosion of the Palace of Dargonus replica, allowing the Lord Captain to break free.

traits.locale_text: ドガノスの宮殿のレプリカが爆発し、異星人の罠が破壊されたことで、ロード・キャプテンは解放された。
